title.target: Dì èr líng líng yī zhāng: Qū zhé de dào lù

pairs.target: Xī dé hé Fēi lì sī zhī jiān de zhàn dòu
pairs.english: The battle between Sid and Felise

pairs.target: jiù xiàng yī chǎng xiǎo xiǎo de zāi nàn...
pairs.english: was like a small calamity...

pairs.target: ...fā shēng zài yī chǎng gèng pángdà de hàojié de kǒngbù zhī zhōng.
pairs.english: ...one taking place within the terror of a much vaster cataclysm.

pairs.target: zài nà piàn zhàn chǎng shàng,
pairs.english: On that battlefield,

pairs.target: chéng qiān shàng wàn de Juéxǐng zhě
pairs.english: hundreds of thousands of Awakened

pairs.target: shì tú xiāng hù shā lù,
pairs.english: sought to destroy each other,

pairs.target: cóng yī gè dì píng xiàn yán shēn dào lìng yī gè dì píng xiàn,
pairs.english: stretching from one horizon to another,

pairs.target: bèi tā men zhào huàn dào shì jiè de qiáng dà ér měng liè de lì liàng suǒ jǐ yā.
pairs.english: strained by the great and violent forces they summoned into the world.

pairs.target: tā men tóu dǐng shì shǎn yào yún céng de zhē bì;
pairs.english: Above them was the shroud of radiant clouds;

pairs.target: tā men jiǎo xià shì yī wèi sǐ qù shén zhī de gǔ tóu.
pairs.english: beneath them were the bones of a dead deity.

pairs.target: zì cóng Yí wàng zhī àn yǐ lái,
pairs.english: Since the Forgotten Shore,

pairs.target: Xī dé hé Fēi lì sī yǐ jīng zǒu guò le hěn yuǎn de lù.
pairs.english: Sid and Felise had come a long way.

pairs.target: rán'ér jīn tiān,
pairs.english: Today, however,

pairs.target: tā men de qū zhé dào lù zài cì jiāo huì...
pairs.english: their winding paths crossed once again...

pairs.target: ...zhǐ wèi ràng yī tiáo dào lù zhōng jié lìng yī tiáo.
pairs.english: ...only for one path to put an end to the other.

pairs.target: dāng Fēi lì sī bǎ tā tuī tuì shí,
pairs.english: As Felise pushed her back,

pairs.target: Xī dé cháng dào le zuǐ lǐ de xuè wèi.
pairs.english: Sid tasted blood in her mouth.

pairs.target: tā men yí dòng de sù dù zhī kuài,
pairs.english: They moved with such speed

pairs.target: ràng jī liè de pèng zhuàng kàn qǐ lái xiàng yī piàn mó hú —
pairs.english: that their furious clash appeared like a blur —

pairs.target: bù shí, chéng qún jiāo zhàn de Juéxǐng zhě shì bīng dǎng zhù le tā men,
pairs.english: from time to time, groups of fighting Awakened soldiers got in their way,

pairs.target: jié guǒ zhǐ shì bèi měng liè de pāo zhì yī páng.
pairs.english: only to be violently tossed aside.

pairs.target: yǒu xiē rén huó le xià lái...
pairs.english: Some survived...

pairs.target: yǒu xiē rén zé méi nà me xìng yùn.
pairs.english: ...some were less fortunate.

pairs.target: 'Gāi sǐ!'
pairs.english: 'Curse it!'

pairs.target: tā diào yòng le zì jǐ suǒ yǒu de zhàn dòu jīng yàn —
pairs.english: She drew on all her combat experience —

pairs.target: shì jiè shàng hěn shǎo yǒu rén bǐ tā jīng yàn gèng fēng fù —
pairs.english: few in the world had more of that than her —

pairs.target: hé tā suǒ yǒu de jì qiǎo.
pairs.english: and all her skill.

pairs.target: tā de jiàn yí dòng zhe, fǎng fú huó wù yī bān,
pairs.english: Her sword moved as if it was a living thing,

pairs.target: yī cì yòu yī cì de gé dǎng zhe gōng jī.
pairs.english: deflecting blow after blow after blow.
